# Environmental-Response Reliabilism

**Node Type:** synthesis
**Node ID:** 3c58400a-1580-4920-81d1-bde88af8d926
**Depth:** 5
**Terminal:** No

**Parent:** [Can Reliabilism address changes in reliability over time?](can-reliabilism-address-changes-in-reliability-over-time-antithesis-8abfe235-caeb-4dbe-9884-1c7ddf408536.md)

## Content

**A person knows a proposition if they believe it**, **A proposition is known if it is true**, **A proposition is known if the belief is generated by a process that effectively responds to changes in the environment to maintain reliability**
